'''Tine Felix''' was the daughter of the free-trader [[Vazan Felix]] and his wife [[Cyra Felix]].

==Biography==
She was captured along with her mother by [[Zhen Mirat]], leader of [[The Fatal Visionaries]], as ransom to get both [[The Fatal Vision|''Tine's Future'']] and to ensure that her father would continue to fly the ship under Mirat's command. She was held prisoner by Mirat for at least six months, he had had no intention to give either her or her mother back to Vazan once he had agreed to help, until a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebels]] helped free her and her mother from Mirat's clutches. The family were then re-united.
